notes: Pinned provider boundary: terraform-provider-oci at the sources.lock revision does not register an aispeech TranscriptionJob resource or datasource, so this row keeps a repo-curated oci_ai_speech_transcription_job placeholder identifier and records the reviewed OCI SDK CRUD surface instead of formal-import output.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: CreateTranscriptionJob, GetTranscriptionJob, ListTranscriptionJobs, UpdateTranscriptionJob, and DeleteTranscriptionJob form the published CRUD surface, while CancelTranscriptionJob remains an auxiliary SDK operation outside the controller-backed runtime contract.

Pinned OCI SDK lifecycle shape: TranscriptionJob exposes ACCEPTED, IN_PROGRESS, SUCCEEDED, FAILED, CANCELING, and CANCELED. Repo-authored controller semantics map ACCEPTED and IN_PROGRESS to provisioning, SUCCEEDED to active, FAILED to terminal failure, and keep CANCELING or CANCELED as delete breadcrumbs until GetTranscriptionJob returns not found.

Repo-authored mutation and lookup policy stays explicit: only displayName, description, freeformTags, and definedTags reconcile in place; compartmentId remains replacement-only drift; the refreshed modelDetails.transcriptionSettings.additionalSettings map is carried by CreateTranscriptionJob and read-model status projection, but UpdateTranscriptionJobDetails still omits it so later drift remains create-only; list reuse is restricted to the compartment-filtered ListTranscriptionJobs request shape with exact displayName or tracked OCID matching.
